message:
fix(time): replace panic on repoll-after-completion with fail-closed Elapsed in TimeoutFuture

The previous commit added assert!(!self.completed) which panicked if
a TimeoutFuture was polled after returning Poll::Ready. This broke
callers that accidentally hold a reference after completion (e.g.
select! branches that get polled one extra time).

Replace the assert with a fail-closed guard that returns
Err(Elapsed) deterministically, covering both poll() and
poll_with_time() paths. Also check the new timed_out flag so both
completion states are handled uniformly.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
